pin: Pin your project's runtime or package manager
list all: List all installed tools(include different version)
list --format: {{$PSCompletions.config.sym}}Specify the output format [possible values: human, plain]
install:
Usage: install <node|npm|yarn|...>
Install a tool in your toolchain
e.g. volta install node@lts
     volta install yarn@1
fetch:
Usage: fetch <node|npm|yarn|...>
Fetch a tool to the local machine
e.g. volta install node@lts
     volta install yarn@1
uninstall:
Usage: volta uninstall <node|npm|yarn|...>
Uninstall a tool in your toolchain
e.g. volta uninstall node@lts
which: Locate the actual binary that will be called by Volta
run: {{$PSCompletions.config.sym}}Run a command with custom node/npm/pnpm/yarn versions
run --env: {{$PSCompletions.config.sym_wr}}Set an environment variable (can be used multiple times)
run --bundled-npm: {{$PSCompletions.config.sym_opt}}Force npm to be the version bundled with Node
-v: Print the current version of Volta
setup: Enable Volta for the current user / shell
